title: User Decision Analysis — Lease vs. Own
subtitle: The most-overlooked skill in CRE: when a business should buy its real estate
description: The topic most free CRE content skips entirely. Business owners constantly ask: should we lease this space or buy it? The answer is a quantifiable cost-of-occupancy comparison, and a broker who can run it becomes indispensable. This course teaches the full framework.
outcomes: Build a lease-vs-own cost-of-occupancy model over a 10-year hold
Factor in SBA 504 financing advantages for owner-users
Explain after-tax cash flow differences between leasing and owning
Advise business-owner clients on the true economics of their space decisions
Position yourself as a tenant rep or owner-user specialist
keywords: lease vs own commercial real estate
